title: Soabout Kaworu and Shinji really being girls
display_title: Soabout Kaworu and Shinji really being girls
wikitext:
[]: So...about Kaworu and Shinji... [really being girls]             Quote Post by Forte V4 » Sun Feb 18, 2007 11:24 pm Yeah, it's probably been asked several billion times, but I gotta ask: between Kaworu and Shinji, were either of them homo? Kaworu didn't know enough about human-human interactions to know what saying "I love you" means, but Shinji...I've had my doubts about him but seeing the first scene of EoE might mean he's bi or something. But could it be that he openly accepted Kaworu because he was the only one to offer Shinji any sort of affection? ...yes I'm a terrible person to wonder about this age old subject; spare me, it's been nagging at me.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 18, 2007 11:29 pm Kaworu isn't a homo. She is, however, a lesbian. (Lilith knows all about this.) ... Perhaps someone less lazy than I can dig out the Old Thread Links.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Mon Feb 19, 2007 1:54 am Is Kaworu gay? For Shinji, perhaps, but having just seen Brokeback, I have to say...not literally. Pretend there is no weird same gender barriar for a second. Kaworu loved Shinji becuase who he was, not becuase he was a guy. Shinji liked Kaworu becuase he treated him kindly and lived him. So. Did Kaworu like Shinji? Yes. Did it mean that he was literally gay? No. P.S. I'm very tired and my spelling must suck. I'm sure none of this makes sense anyway, so I apologize.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Feb 19, 2007 2:06 am Reichu wrote: Kaworu isn't a homo. She is, however, a lesbian. (Lilith knows all about this.)

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Feb 19, 2007 2:28 am Reichu wrote: She is, however, a lesbian. (Lilith knows all about this.)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 19, 2007 2:30 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Are you pondering what I'm pondering?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Feb 19, 2007 2:32 am I always thought Kaworu's "love" for Shinji was on a deeper level as a human. He says himself he doesn't understand the Lilim, so perhaps he understands Shinji because he isn't as drunk with power and his own ideals like so many of the other Lilim Kaworu's met (Seele, mainly). I always figured Shinji's affection for Kaworu just came from the fact that Kaworu was the only one in the show that seemd to really give a damn about Shinji's feelings (or atleast Shinji felt he did). So, my thinking was that the love was mutual, but in a different way than when a man loves a woman or man loves a man ala Brokeback...

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Feb 19, 2007 2:49 am Mr. Tines wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Are you pondering what I'm pondering?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Feb 19, 2007 2:59 am That image is truly terrifying...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 19, 2007 8:15 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: That image is truly terrifying...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Feb 19, 2007 9:54 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I think it's quite awesome. How else are Shinji and Kaworu supposed to make sweet sweet love?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Feb 19, 2007 12:19 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Are you pondering what I'm pondering?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Feb 19, 2007 12:45 pm please notice here that Shinji has no penis. Shinji is just as much girl than Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Feb 19, 2007 1:08 pm Way to go Reichu, take a good long look at what you caused.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Feb 19, 2007 1:37 pm MASS HYSTERIA!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Feb 19, 2007 2:40 pm @this thread This is all your fault Reichu!

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Mon Feb 19, 2007 3:23 pm You guys are crazy. Look what you all did to such a nice, serious topic! Have you no shame? Because, really, guys, shame on you! :P And, shame on me, too. Hah!

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Mon Feb 19, 2007 3:29 pm "LIEK OMFG HES GHEY OMG NO WAI THAT GROSS EWWWWWW :(((((" Gay or not, who gives a shit?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 19, 2007 3:30 pm Timstuff wrote: MASS HYSTERIA!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 19, 2007 4:05 pm @Timstuff, Eva Yojimbo There is a lot of Shinjiko fan-art (and a lot where more of the cast have transgendered ). The characters do transgress typical gender roles -- remember all the comments about Shinji being a boy, with the implication he wasn't acting like one. Some people have observed that more conventional plot-stereotypes emerge if you perform the switch. Reichu wrote: ... Perhaps someone less lazy than I can dig out the Old Thread Links.
